channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 3rd March
item.description:
PERM REPAIR job 43118249: pothole
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unpermitted roadworks problem, 3rd March
item.description:
Please see attached from MP Rec 03.03.2026 - 15:38
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Almost the whole length of the A46 from Brockworth X Hands to Fiddlers Elbow requires resurfacing. The surface is so broken that it becoming impossible to keep momentum on a road bike., 3rd March
item.description:
Climb to Fiddlers Elbow A46
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Painswick Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Only one of the many potholes has been repaired., 3rd March
item.description:
This morning a team arrived at 10:00. They spent fifteen minutes failing to repair the pothole at the end of Bayshill Lane, at least 90 minutes chatting with the engineer running and then 30 minutes repairing only one in a long string of potholes on Bayshill Road. These potholes, and those on the others side of the road have been there for well over two years.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bayshill Road, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole at the end of Bayshill Lane has been repaired in such a shoddy fashion that half of it is still there., 3rd March
item.description:
Ashfield House, Bayshill Lane, Cheltenham GL50 3AX

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bayshill Lane, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 3rd March
item.description:
Jetter for 3 x manholes

item.title: Multiple pot holes after the railway bridge heading towards the airport just before the turning to the Reddings, 3rd March
item.description:
After the railway bridge on the read heading towards the airport before the turning to the Reddings
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Badgeworth Road, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury

item.title: A pothole that hasn’t sometime been filled in but now deep again & hard to avoid, 3rd March
item.description:
In Bethesda st on the left hand side of the carriageway passed the physio clinic
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Bethesda Street, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green or amber traffic light is not working problem, 3rd March
item.description:
Lights are stuck on red for pedestrians which is ultimately causing traffic to stop. This is resulting in tail back queues and will get worse come 4pm onwards.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 3rd March
item.description:
CWPH 1000 X 600 X 69mm ROAD CLOSURE MARKED AS NUMBER 1 (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More craters than the moon!, 3rd March
item.description:
Driving on the moon would be safer than this entire stretch of road - an absolute disgrace, let alone being a serious safety concern.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Whittington Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A manhole making a lot of noise as you go over it so must be very loose, 3rd March
item.description:
As you go towards Princess Elizabeth way on the left hand side of the carriageway just before St Peters church
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 84-92, Tewkesbury Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 3rd March
item.description:
Customer reporting a 'trench' at RAB, travelling from Whitcombe, past filling station. Customer witnessed cyclist fall from bike as he went around RAB. Customer requesting inspection of area around RAB, also travelling from Brockworth towards Birdlip.
Report on FixMyStreet
